title: SimpleTeleport
description: A teleportation plugin with homes, warps, spawn management, and back command for Minecraft.
body:
SimpleTeleport is a teleportation plugin that provides essential teleport features for your Minecraft server. Set homes, create warps, manage spawn points, and teleport back to previous locations.

## What's New in Version 1.2.0:
- Multi-home support: Set, list, and teleport to multiple named homes per player
- /homes and /home [name] commands now support clickable and hoverable home lists (teleport by click, show coordinates on hover)
- Tab-completion for home names and player names in relevant commands
- /homeother [player] [home] command for teleporting to another player's named home
- Improved data structure for homes
- Bugfixes and usability improvements
- Config and messages auto-updater: On plugin update, missing entries in config.yml and messages.yml are automatically added, while your custom values remain untouched

## Commands:
- /sethome <name> - Set your personal home location (optionally with a name)
- /home <name> - Teleport to your home (optionally specify a home name)
- /homes - List all your homes (clickable/hoverable list)
- /homeother <player> [home] - Teleport to another player's named home (requires permission)
- /delhome [name] - Delete one of your homes (optionally specify a home name)
- /delhome <player> [home] - Delete another player's named home (requires permission)
- /warp <name> - Teleport to a warp point
- /setwarp <name> - Create a new warp point
- /delwarp <name> - Delete a warp point
- /warps - List all available warps
- /spawn - Teleport to the server spawn
- /spawn set - Set the server spawn location
- /back - Teleport to your last location

## Permissions:
- SimpleTeleport.* - Access to all plugin commands
- SimpleTeleport.sethome - Allows setting your home
- SimpleTeleport.home - Allows teleporting to your home
- SimpleTeleport.home.others - Allows teleporting to other players' homes
- SimpleTeleport.warp - Allows using warps
- SimpleTeleport.setwarp - Allows creating warps
- SimpleTeleport.warps - Allows listing warps
- SimpleTeleport.spawn - Allows teleporting to spawn
- SimpleTeleport.setspawn - Allows setting the spawn point
- SimpleTeleport.back - Allows using the back command

## Features in Detail:

### Home System:
- Players can set their personal home location
- Configurable maximum number of homes per player
- Option to restrict home setting to specific worlds
- Teleport to other players' homes with proper permissions

### Warp System:
- Admins create public warp points accessible to all players
- Easy-to-use warp list command
- Prevents duplicate warp names
- Supports warps across different worlds

### Spawn Management:
- Set a global spawn point for the server
- Optional teleportation to spawn on first join
- Optional respawn at spawn instead of bed
- Simple /spawn command for quick access

### Back Command:
- Remembers your last location before teleportation
- Optional saving of death locations
- Configurable to remember multiple previous locations
- Works after any teleport command

### Data Storage:
- All data stored in YAML format
- Separate files for homes, warps, and spawn
- Easy to backup and transfer
- Human-readable and editable

Just send me a message on [Discord](https://discord.com/invite/vVrpvBEfeQ) if you have any questions, suggestions, or requests for new features!
